title: Entropic Bridge: Thermodynamics of Cognitive Systems
abstract: Free energy principle applied to cognitive prosthetics

body.text: This paper applies the free energy principle and entropic bridge concept to cognitive prosthetics, establishing that cognitive systems maintain homeostasis by minimizing surprise through action and perception.
The free energy principle provides a unified theory of brain function, cognition, and behavior as systems that minimize surprise or prediction error.
Cognitive systems maintain homeostasis through entropic exchange
Perception acts to reduce sensory entropy
Action alters the world to match predictions
Cognitive prosthetics must support this entropic exchange
Support user agency in world modification
All P31 Labs designs incorporate entropic bridge principles to support cognitive homeostasis and reduce predictive load on neurodivergent users.
